testcase.name: verifyLoginScenarios

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //h2[normalize-space()='My Account' because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//h2[normalize-space()='My Account'' is not a valid XPath expression.
